Document:
# Reporter
1. Reporters report directly to the Head of Personnel.
2. Reporters may investigate around station for new information regarding ongoing situations or new situations occurring on station.
3. Reporters may request interviews with any crew member, and may record it using a Tape Recorder.
4. Reporters may use their handheld cameras or if available setup wireless cameras.
5. Reporters may wear the press armor on blue and above if reporting in areas that may place them at risk.
6. While wearing press equipment (holo-pin and Armor), reporters may not engage in combat except in self-defense.
7. The HOP may temporarily revoke the reporter's equipment (vest, camera, recorder) or immediately demote them for SOP breaches.
